'''âp-h-v''' ('''kapahav''') is an [[Aelaki]] [[Verbs|active verb]] meaning "[[Wikt:quantify|quantify]] (auto-generated)".

== Overview ==
{| class="wikitable"
|-
! Root consonants
| p-h-v
|-
! Word class
| [[Active verb]]
|-
! Gloss
| [[Wikt:quantify|quantify]] (auto-generated)
|-
! Citation form
| âp-h-v
|-
! Lemma
| kapahav
|}

== [[Agent]] agreement paradigm ==
''Base present, no evidential.''
{| class="wikitable sortable"
! Gender.Number !! 1st !! 2nd !! 3rd !! 4th
|-
| [[child]].[[collective]] || [[word:thipahav|thipahav]] || [[word:jipahav|jipahav]] || [[word:shipahav|shipahav]] || [[word:kipahav|kipahav]]
|-
| [[child]].[[plural]] || [[word:thuthupahav|thuthupahav]] || [[word:jujupahav|jujupahav]] || [[word:shushupahav|shushupahav]] || [[word:kukupahav|kukupahav]]
|-
| [[child]].[[singular]] || [[word:thupahav|thupahav]] || [[word:jupahav|jupahav]] || [[word:shupahav|shupahav]] || [[word:kupahav|kupahav]]
|-
| [[child]].[[zero]] || [[word:thupahav|thupahav]] || [[word:jupahav|jupahav]] || [[word:shupahav|shupahav]] || [[word:kupahav|kupahav]]
|-
| [[female]].[[collective]] || [[word:thepahav|thepahav]] || [[word:jepahav|jepahav]] || [[word:shepahav|shepahav]] || [[word:kepahav|kepahav]]
|-
| [[female]].[[plural]] || [[word:thothopahav|thothopahav]] || [[word:jojopahav|jojopahav]] || [[word:shoshopahav|shoshopahav]] || [[word:kokopahav|kokopahav]]
|-
| [[female]].[[singular]] || [[word:thopahav|thopahav]] || [[word:jopahav|jopahav]] || [[word:shopahav|shopahav]] || [[word:kopahav|kopahav]]
|-
| [[female]].[[zero]] || [[word:thopahav|thopahav]] || [[word:jopahav|jopahav]] || [[word:shopahav|shopahav]] || [[word:kopahav|kopahav]]
|-
| [[male]].[[collective]] || [[word:thĂŠpahav|thĂŠpahav]] || [[word:jĂŠpahav|jĂŠpahav]] || [[word:shĂŠpahav|shĂŠpahav]] || [[word:kĂŠpahav|kĂŠpahav]]
|-
| [[male]].[[plural]] || [[word:thathapahav|thathapahav]] || [[word:jajapahav|jajapahav]] || [[word:shashapahav|shashapahav]] || [[word:kakapahav|kakapahav]]
|-
| [[male]].[[singular]] || [[word:thapahav|thapahav]] || [[word:japahav|japahav]] || [[word:shapahav|shapahav]] || [[word:kapahav|kapahav]]
|-
| [[male]].[[zero]] || [[word:thapahav|thapahav]] || [[word:japahav|japahav]] || [[word:shapahav|shapahav]] || [[word:kapahav|kapahav]]
|}

== Evidential and TAM forms ==
{| class="wikitable sortable"
! Form !! Surface form
|-
| [[active]].none || [[word:shapahav|shapahav]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].none || [[word:goshapahav|goshapahav]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].none || [[word:gokishapahav|gokishapahav]]
|-
| [[active]].[[present]] || [[word:shapahavnĂŒ|shapahavnĂŒ]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[present]] || [[word:goshapahavnknĂŒ|goshapahavnknĂŒ]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[present]] || [[word:gokishapahavnĂŒ|gokishapahavnĂŒ]]
|-
| [[active]].[[past]]_[[visual]] || [[word:shapahavshĂ«|shapahavshĂ«]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[past]]_[[visual]] || [[word:goshapahavnkshĂ«|goshapahavnkshĂ«]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[past]]_[[visual]] || [[word:gokishapahavshĂ«|gokishapahavshĂ«]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hearsay]] || [[word:shapahavro|shapahavro]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[hearsay]] || [[word:goshapahavnkro|goshapahavnkro]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[hearsay]] || [[word:gokishapahavro|gokishapahavro]]
|-
| [[active]].[[inferential]] || [[word:shapahavmu|shapahavmu]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[inferential]] || [[word:goshapahavnkmu|goshapahavnkmu]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[inferential]] || [[word:gokishapahavmu|gokishapahavmu]]
|-
| [[active]].[[mythical]] || [[word:shapahavsher|shapahavsher]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[mythical]] || [[word:goshapahavnksher|goshapahavnksher]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[mythical]] || [[word:gokishapahavsher|gokishapahavsher]]
|-
| [[active]].[[intention]] || [[word:shapahavng|shapahavng]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[intention]] || [[word:goshapahavnkng|goshapahavnkng]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[intention]] || [[word:gokishapahavng|gokishapahavng]]
|-
| [[active]].[[optative]] || [[word:shapahavya|shapahavya]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[optative]] || [[word:goshapahavnkya|goshapahavnkya]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[optative]] || [[word:gokishapahavya|gokishapahavya]]
|-
| [[active]].[[deliberative]] || [[word:shapahavyam|shapahavyam]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[deliberative]] || [[word:goshapahavnkyam|goshapahavnkyam]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[deliberative]] || [[word:gokishapahavyam|gokishapahavyam]]
|-
| [[active]].[[present]]_[[past]] || [[word:shapahavnĂŒshĂ«|shapahavnĂŒshĂ«]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[present]]_[[past]] || [[word:goshapahavnknĂŒshĂ«|goshapahavnknĂŒshĂ«]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[present]]_[[past]] || [[word:gokishapahavnĂŒshĂ«|gokishapahavnĂŒshĂ«]]
|-
| [[active]].[[present]]_[[hearsay]] || [[word:shapahavnĂŒro|shapahavnĂŒro]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[present]]_[[hearsay]] || [[word:goshapahavnknĂŒro|goshapahavnknĂŒro]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[present]]_[[hearsay]] || [[word:gokishapahavnĂŒro|gokishapahavnĂŒro]]
|-
| [[active]].[[present]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:shapahavnĂŒmu|shapahavnĂŒmu]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[present]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:goshapahavnknĂŒmu|goshapahavnknĂŒmu]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[present]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:gokishapahavnĂŒmu|gokishapahavnĂŒmu]]
|-
| [[active]].[[past]]_[[present]] || [[word:shapahavshĂ«nĂŒ|shapahavshĂ«nĂŒ]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[past]]_[[present]] || [[word:goshapahavnkshĂ«nĂŒ|goshapahavnkshĂ«nĂŒ]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[past]]_[[present]] || [[word:gokishapahavshĂ«nĂŒ|gokishapahavshĂ«nĂŒ]]
|-
| [[active]].[[past]]_[[hearsay]] || [[word:shapahavshĂ«ro|shapahavshĂ«ro]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[past]]_[[hearsay]] || [[word:goshapahavnkshĂ«ro|goshapahavnkshĂ«ro]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[past]]_[[hearsay]] || [[word:gokishapahavshĂ«ro|gokishapahavshĂ«ro]]
|-
| [[active]].[[past]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:shapahavshĂ«mu|shapahavshĂ«mu]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[past]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:goshapahavnkshĂ«mu|goshapahavnkshĂ«mu]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[past]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:gokishapahavshĂ«mu|gokishapahavshĂ«mu]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hearsay]]_[[present]] || [[word:shapahavronĂŒ|shapahavronĂŒ]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[hearsay]]_[[present]] || [[word:goshapahavnkronĂŒ|goshapahavnkronĂŒ]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[hearsay]]_[[present]] || [[word:gokishapahavronĂŒ|gokishapahavronĂŒ]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hearsay]]_[[past]] || [[word:shapahavroshĂ«|shapahavroshĂ«]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[hearsay]]_[[past]] || [[word:goshapahavnkroshĂ«|goshapahavnkroshĂ«]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[hearsay]]_[[past]] || [[word:gokishapahavroshĂ«|gokishapahavroshĂ«]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hearsay]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:shapahavromu|shapahavromu]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[hearsay]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:goshapahavnkromu|goshapahavnkromu]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[hearsay]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:gokishapahavromu|gokishapahavromu]]
|-
| [[active]].[[inferential]]_[[present]] || [[word:shapahavmunĂŒ|shapahavmunĂŒ]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[inferential]]_[[present]] || [[word:goshapahavnkmunĂŒ|goshapahavnkmunĂŒ]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[inferential]]_[[present]] || [[word:gokishapahavmunĂŒ|gokishapahavmunĂŒ]]
|-
| [[active]].[[inferential]]_[[past]] || [[word:shapahavmushĂ«|shapahavmushĂ«]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[inferential]]_[[past]] || [[word:goshapahavnkmushĂ«|goshapahavnkmushĂ«]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[inferential]]_[[past]] || [[word:gokishapahavmushĂ«|gokishapahavmushĂ«]]
|-
| [[active]].[[inferential]]_[[hearsay]] || [[word:shapahavmuro|shapahavmuro]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[inferential]]_[[hearsay]] || [[word:goshapahavnkmuro|goshapahavnkmuro]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[inferential]]_[[hearsay]] || [[word:gokishapahavmuro|gokishapahavmuro]]
|}

''63 forms generated.''

== See also ==
* [[Aelaki Lexicon]]

{{wordpage|46bbfe2}}
